relations.note: Both are approved-messaging blocks within the same campaign verbatim framework.
Both are body-copy claims that typically appear together in the same campaign narrative.

effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.
YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

governance.preferred_form: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

rules.intent: Lock the MLR-approved campaign headline exactly as cleared.
rules.rule_text: The approved campaign headline must be reproduced verbatim: 'YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.' No paraphrasing or truncation is permitted.

effect.content: LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:

quotes: LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:
*Increase your muscle strength* / *Improve your skin symptoms* / *Rely less on steroids* / *Do more of the activities you love*

governance.preferred_form: LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:

quotes: LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:

rules.intent: Preserve the approved benefits claim set and its order.
rules.rule_text: The product-benefits lead-in ('LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:') must be followed by exactly the four approved benefit bullets, in this order: 'Increase your muscle strength', 'Improve your skin symptoms', 'Rely less on steroids', 'Do more of the activities you love'.

effect.content: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.

quotes: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.
Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.
...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position.

governance.preferred_form: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.

quotes: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.

rules.intent: Ensure MOA claims stay within MLR-approved language.
rules.rule_text: Mechanism-of-action messaging uses one of two approved verbatim options: primary — 'Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.'; alternate — '...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the "on" position.' Only these two approved phrasings may be used to describe MOA.

effect.content: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

quotes: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.
LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

governance.preferred_form: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

quotes: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

rules.intent: Keep the approved administration/convenience claim intact.
rules.rule_text: The administration claim must appear verbatim: 'LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.'

effect.content: Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.

quotes: Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.
Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.

governance.preferred_form: Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.

quotes: Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.

rules.intent: Maintain the cleared call-to-action wording driving HCP conversations.
rules.rule_text: The doctor-discussion CTA copy must use the approved pattern verbatim: 'Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.'

quotes: Support program name: **My Compass Support** (patient support: Personalized Communication via PAL — text, phone, email, in person; Authorization Support).

rules.intent: Protect the branded support-program name and keep its scope accurate.
rules.rule_text: The patient support program must always be referred to by its exact name, 'My Compass Support', and its described scope is limited to Personalized Communication via PAL (text, phone, email, in person) and Authorization Support.
